title: On Building Things
preview: The act of making something from nothing is the closest we get to understanding what we are.

title: Notes on Attention
preview: What you pay attention to is what you become.

title: Systems vs. Goals
preview: Goals are for direction. Systems are for showing up.

title: On Solitude
preview: There is a difference between loneliness and being alone with yourself.

title: Fragment: The Room
preview: He kept the window open even in winter. Said it reminded him that the world outside was still moving.
